def match_keywords(text, keywords):
    normalized_text = text.lower().strip()
    matches = []
    for keyword in keywords:
        if keyword.lower().strip() in normalized_text:
            matches.append(keyword)
    return matches


def filter_by_prefix(items, prefix):
    normalized_prefix = prefix.lower().strip()
    results = []
    for item in items:
        name = item.name.lower().strip()
        if name.startswith(normalized_prefix):
            results.append(item)
        elif name == normalized_prefix:
            results.append(item)
    return results
